text.title: Contract-First Development Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply contract-first-development end-to-end from greenfield API to merged spec + generated artefacts.

step.name: scope-the-api
step.input: Resource model + consumer list + auth scheme
step.action: Enumerate resources, lifecycle states, list/detail/create/update/delete operations needed. Decide auth scheme (bearer JWT default) and error envelope shape.

step.name: draft-the-spec
step.action: Author openapi.yaml starting from `templates/openapi-scaffold.yaml`. Define every schema under `components/schemas`; reference via $ref. Assign operationId to every operation.

step.name: lint-and-iterate
step.action: Run spectral against draft. Fix every error before review; address warnings or document why ignored.
step.decision-gate: If >5 spectral errors persist after second pass, escalate — likely an architectural misfit between conventions and intended API.

step.name: human-review
step.action: Open PR. Reviewers walk the endpoint inventory, error envelope, pagination shape, auth coverage. Approvals from BE + FE + tech-lead required for public APIs.

step.name: generate-stubs-and-sdks
step.action: Run codegen (openapi-generator or orval) into generated dirs. Wire prism mock server for FE local dev. Generated dirs are CI-rebuilt, never hand-edited.
step.output: Server stubs + client SDKs + prism mock

step.name: ship-with-diff-gate
step.action: Run oasdiff breaking. If breaking, bump MAJOR + add `BREAKING-CHANGE:` to commit body. Run `templates/check-spec-drift.sh` as the merge gate.
